CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-11-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise Hearing.
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Pappina Thompson.
Ira Freydkis, Esq. for Petitioner: Sajma Blazevic, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Aldijana Blazevic, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Medical Expenses $2,200.00
A net balance of $5,300.00 to be held in trust for the benefit of the minor until the minor reaches the age of 18.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
